abstract: Workflow for generating professional design deliverables (design system PDFs, brand guidelines, audit reports, competitive analyses, component specs). Orchestrates all other design-agent skills to create branded, narrative-driven documents that tell the story: Problem → Analysis → Recommendation → Action. Includes 4 complete templates (design system doc, visual audit report, competitive analysis, component library spec), AC brand standards, quality checklist, and 7 common pitfalls with fixes.
